headline: Guy's Pickup Line Was So Bad She Screenshotted It, Framed It, And Hung It In Her Office
summary: The museum of bad pickup lines has offered her $500 for the original screenshot.
fullBody: 'Are you a parking ticket? No wait, that's not right.' That's the message Tyler McRizz sent to Jessica Thompson. Jessica not only didn't reply — she printed the message, framed it, and hung it in her office. 'It's motivation,' Jessica explained. 'If I can survive this DM, I can survive anything.' Tyler has since deleted his Instagram. The DM is now part of a modern art exhibit.
